narrative:
Union Twp (precinct in Pike County) has 902 registered voters, with 59.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.6 percentage points.
